---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Best Of Rust
title: "[Bug] - Your Summary Plz"
labels: bug
---

<div align="center">
  <h1>Bug Report</h1>
  <p>Help us improve Best Of Rust by sharing clear and reproducible bug details.</p>
  <sub>请提供清晰且可复现的 Bug 信息，帮助我们改进 Best Of Rust。</sub>
</div>

<br>

## 1. What happened?
<sub>发生了什么问题？</sub>

<!-- Describe the bug clearly and concisely. -->
<!-- 请简洁清晰地描述这个 Bug。 -->

## 2. Steps to reproduce
<sub>如何复现这个问题</sub>

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
复现步骤：

- 
- 
- 

## 3. What did you expect to happen?
<sub>你期望发生什么结果？</sub>

<!-- Describe the expected behavior clearly and concisely. -->
<!-- 请简洁清晰地描述你的预期行为。 -->

## 4. Screenshots or logs (optional)
<sub>截图或日志（可选）</sub>

<!-- Add screenshots, error messages, or logs if they help explain the issue. -->
<!-- 如有帮助，请补充截图、报错信息或日志。 -->

## 5. Environment
<sub>环境信息</sub>

- OS info / 操作系统:         <!-- e.g. macOS, NixOS 25.05 -->
- App platform / 运行平台:    <!-- e.g. web, desktop -->

## 6. Questionnaire (optional)
<sub>问卷（可选）</sub>

<!-- If relevant, uncomment one or more lines below. -->
<!-- 如符合你的情况，请取消下面一行或多行的注释。 -->

<!-- I'm interested in fixing this myself but don't know where to start. / 我有兴趣自己修复，但还不知道从哪里开始。 -->
<!-- I would like to fix this and I already have a solution. / 我愿意修复，并且已经有解决思路。 -->
<!-- I don't have time to fix this now, but I may revisit it later. / 我暂时没有时间修复，之后可能会回来看。 -->

<br>

<div align="center">
  <h3>Thank you for helping improve Best Of Rust.</h3>
  <sub>感谢你帮助 Best Of Rust 变得更好。</sub>
</div>
